nasb.text: You who rejoice in Lodebar, And say, “Have we not by our own strength taken Karnaim for ourselves?”

esv.text: you who rejoice in Lo-debar, who say, “Have we not by our own strength captured Karnaim for ourselves?”

cnv.text: 你們以奪取羅底巴為誇耀， 說：“我們奪取加寧不是靠自己的力量嗎？”

ccb.text: 你们炫耀自己征服了罗底巴， 吹嘘凭自己的能力夺取了加宁。
